title: How Trump Decided to Go to War With Iran
summary_full: President Trump’s embrace of military action in Iran was spurred by an Israeli leader determined to end diplomatic negotiations. Few of the president’s advisers voiced opposition.
summary_public: President Trump’s embrace of military action in Iran was spurred by an Israeli leader determined to end diplomatic negotiations. Few of the president’s advisers voiced opposition.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: spurred by an Israeli leader determined to end diplomatic negotiations
